meta.title: Salt Horse — Great Beer & Burgers, Edinburgh

hero.tagline: Great Beer & Burgers — Edinburgh Old Town

drink.title:
Just the
Good Stuff.
drink.description: We carry a carefully curated and rotating selection of craft beer with fourteen lines on draught and over 200 in cans and bottles. Crack one open here or haul it home. Your call.
drink.feature_1: 14 rotating draught lines — always something new
drink.feature_2: Around 200 cans and bottles from the UK and beyond
drink.feature_3: Always a good selection of alcohol-free and gluten-free beers
drink.feature_4: A small, well-formed selection of wine and spirits
drink.feature_5: Take away available from the bottle shop

food.title:
Smashed.
Gone in Minutes.
food.description: Burgers, wings, chips. That's the focus. The menu's small but tight — dry-aged beef, fried chicken sandwiches, proper chips hand cut and cooked twice. A few things for sharing. A few for soaking up the next beer. Vegan options that hold their own.

book.title: Bookings
book.description: Booking is optional — we always hold half the space for walk-ins. But if you want to guarantee a spot, book below.
book.groups_text: We can't guarantee multiple booked tables will be next to each other — send us an enquiry and we'll sort it.
book.notice_text: Tables are reserved for 10 minutes — give us a call if you're running late. Garden seating is first-come, first-served and cannot be reserved.

location.title: Location & Hours
location.kitchen_note: Walk-in only after the kitchen closes.

footer.tagline: Great Beer & Burgers in Edinburgh's Old Town since 2016.

gift_cards.page_title: Give the Gift of Great Beer
gift_cards.subtitle: Pick a value, tell us who it's for, and we'll take care of the rest.
gift_cards.expires_note: Gift cards are valid for 12 months from purchase.
gift_cards.error_amount: Please select an amount between £25 and £250
gift_cards.confirmation_sent: Confirmation and gift card sent to
gift_cards.for_me_desc: We'll email you a gift card you can print and hand over in person
gift_cards.for_friend_desc: We'll email the gift card straight to them
gift_cards.confirm_self_title: Your gift card is on its way
gift_cards.confirm_self_message: We've sent your gift card to
gift_cards.confirm_friend_message: We've sent a gift card to
gift_cards.confirm_friend_email: The gift card has been emailed to

gift_cards_success.title: Thank You!
gift_cards_success.subtitle: Your gift card has been created.
gift_cards_success.email_note: Check your email — your gift card is attached and ready to go.
gift_cards_success.processing_text: Your payment is being confirmed. You'll receive an email with your gift card shortly.

groups.title: Planning Something Bigger?
groups.subtitle: For groups of 7 or more, fill in the form below and we'll get back to you to sort out the details.
groups.comments_placeholder: Celebrating something? Any dietary needs? Let us know here.
groups.age_notice: Salt Horse is an 18+ venue. All guests must be 18 or over.
groups.response_time: We'll get back to you as soon as we can — usually within 24 hours.
groups.success_text: Thanks — we've got your details and we'll be in touch soon to confirm everything.
groups.error_details: Please fill in your name, email, and phone number.
groups.error_date_time: Please select a date and time.
groups.error_group_size: Group bookings are for 7 or more people.
